'''yodhavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidelings|hidelings]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidelings|hidelings]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yodhavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhavithi|yodhavithi]] || [[word:yodhaviji|yodhaviji]] || [[word:yodhavishi|yodhavishi]] || [[word:yodhaviki|yodhaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhavuthuthu|yodhavuthuthu]] || [[word:yodhavujuju|yodhavujuju]] || [[word:yodhavushushu|yodhavushushu]] || [[word:yodhavukuku|yodhavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhavuthu|yodhavuthu]] || [[word:yodhavuju|yodhavuju]] || [[word:yodhavushu|yodhavushu]] || [[word:yodhavuku|yodhavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhavufthuf|yodhavufthuf]] || [[word:yodhavufjuf|yodhavufjuf]] || [[word:yodhavufshuf|yodhavufshuf]] || [[word:yodhavufkuf|yodhavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhavethe|yodhavethe]] || [[word:yodhaveje|yodhaveje]] || [[word:yodhaveshe|yodhaveshe]] || [[word:yodhaveke|yodhaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhavothotho|yodhavothotho]] || [[word:yodhavojojo|yodhavojojo]] || [[word:yodhavoshosho|yodhavoshosho]] || [[word:yodhavokoko|yodhavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhavotho|yodhavotho]] || [[word:yodhavojo|yodhavojo]] || [[word:yodhavosho|yodhavosho]] || [[word:yodhavoko|yodhavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhavofthof|yodhavofthof]] || [[word:yodhavofjof|yodhavofjof]] || [[word:yodhavofshof|yodhavofshof]] || [[word:yodhavofkof|yodhavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhavïfthïf|yodhavïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfjïf|yodhavïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfshïf|yodhavïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfkïf|yodhavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhavïfthïfthïf|yodhavïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfjïfjïf|yodhavïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfshïfshïf|yodhavïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfkïfkïf|yodhavïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhavïfthïf|yodhavïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfjïf|yodhavïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfshïf|yodhavïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfkïf|yodhavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhavïfthïf|yodhavïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfjïf|yodhavïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfshïf|yodhavïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhavïfkïf|yodhavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhavæthæ|yodhavæthæ]] || [[word:yodhavæjæ|yodhavæjæ]] || [[word:yodhavæshæ|yodhavæshæ]] || [[word:yodhavækæ|yodhavækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhavathatha|yodhavathatha]] || [[word:yodhavajaja|yodhavajaja]] || [[word:yodhavashasha|yodhavashasha]] || [[word:yodhavakaka|yodhavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhavatha|yodhavatha]] || [[word:yodhavaja|yodhavaja]] || [[word:yodhavasha|yodhavasha]] || [[word:yodhavaka|yodhavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhavafthaf|yodhavafthaf]] || [[word:yodhavafjaf|yodhavafjaf]] || [[word:yodhavafshaf|yodhavafshaf]] || [[word:yodhavafkaf|yodhavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yodhavasha|yodhavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodhavshësha|yodhavshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodhavrosha|yodhavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodhavmusha|yodhavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodhavyasha|yodhavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodhavnkshësha|goyodhavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodhavnkrosha|goyodhavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodhavnkmusha|goyodhavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodhavnkyasha|goyodhavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yodhadhavasha|yodhadhavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodhadhavshësha|yodhadhavshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodhadhavrosha|yodhadhavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodhadhavmusha|yodhadhavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodhadhavyasha|yodhadhavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodhadhavnkshësha|goyodhadhavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodhadhavnkrosha|goyodhadhavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodhadhavnkmusha|goyodhadhavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodhadhavnkyasha|goyodhadhavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yedhævasha|yedhævasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yedhævshësha|yedhævshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yedhævrosha|yedhævrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yedhævmusha|yedhævmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yedhævyasha|yedhævyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyedhævnkshësha|goyedhævnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyedhævnkrosha|goyedhævnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyedhævnkmusha|goyedhævnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyedhævnkyasha|goyedhævnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yodhfavasha|yodhfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodhfavshësha|yodhfavshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodhfavrosha|yodhfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodhfavmusha|yodhfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodhfavyasha|yodhfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodhfavnkshësha|goyodhfavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodhfavnkrosha|goyodhfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodhfavnkmusha|goyodhfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodhfavnkyasha|goyodhfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
